# Log-redaction allowlist — Phase-1 logging (overlay gate 7)
#
# These are the ONLY fields permitted in any log line emitted by a
# Phase-1 logging path (H4 telemetry helper warning, M2 NaN-guard log,
# Advisor render log, or any new Composer/Alpaca client wrapper log).
#
# Adding a field here requires quant-code-reviewer sign-off (R2 from the
# logging-redaction plan).  New fields MUST appear here before they appear
# in any log call.  Fields NOT listed here are forbidden in log output.
#
# Format: one field name per line; lines beginning with # are comments.
# Blank lines are ignored.
#
# Source-of-truth: feature-plans/decision-science/phase-1/logging-redaction/plan.md
# Binding refs: council-attack-rubric.md gate 7; README.md §1 cross-cutting hazards.

# Structural identifiers — correlation handles, not financial data
table_name
cycle_id
error_type
error_message_class

# ---- EXPLICITLY FORBIDDEN (document here so reviewers see the intent) ----
# The following fields MUST NOT appear in any Phase-1 log line:
#   account_id          — Alpaca/Composer account identifier (PII / credential class)
#   position_qty        — financial position data
#   webhook_url         — Discord webhook URL (secret)
#   cvar_5pct           — financial computation output
#   cvar_5pct_stderr    — financial computation output
#   cvar_5pct_long      — financial computation output
#   cvar_n_tail         — count derived from financial data
#   cvar_n_tail_long    — count derived from financial data
#   symphony_id         — routing identifier (not a permitted correlation handle)
#   bearer_token        — API authentication credential
#   api_key_id          — API authentication credential
#   api_secret          — API authentication credential
#   response_body       — raw API response (any vendor)
#   error_args          — raw exception .args (may include response body fragments)
